instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall provide engine braking during vehicle deceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Vehicle_Deceleration exceeds Deceleration_Threshold.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Deceleration > Deceleration_Threshold AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift
